entry.title: Re: Consider Customer Consignment Stock in Classic MRP as...

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Kolkata 2024
entry.content: Please note that there is no automatic confirmation once you left your "yes" (RSVP). You'll get more information via email in the next days. In the meanwhile, please join the Kolkata Group, where you can get also updated information about the event.

entry.title: Re: CIAP@TDF: Baixa de fichas
entry.content:
Fábio

Não faz sentido esse tipo de requerimento do cliente. Não existe nada de contexto que permita esse tipo de ação.

Seria importante voce avaliar com ele o embasamento disso

entry.title: Localized tables in CAP have no draft functionality
entry.content:
Background: 

We have a CAP Service and a UI5 Application, that creates/maintains a text (and some other fields). 
We want our Frontend to be able to maintain this text in multiple languages, therefore we indicated this field as localized in our db/data-model.cds file: 

 

using { cuid, managed } from '@sap/cds/common'; 

namespace com.websol; 

 

annotate FormattedText with @assert.unique: { 

  FormattedText: [ 

    scenario, 

    priority 

  ] 

}; 

 

entity FormattedText: cuid, managed { 

  @mandatory scenario: String; 

  @mandatory priority : Int16; 

  @mandatory value : localized String; 

  @mandatory validFrom: Timestamp; 

  @mandatory validTo: Timestamp; 

  } 

 

For testing purposes we adapted our srv/maintain-service.js to add hardcoded translations for now on the CREATE event (later we want to add translations via Translation API) like this: 

 

const cds = require('@sap/cds') 

const { timeStamp } = require('console') 

const { text } = require('express') 

const { uuid, read, fs, path, decodeURI } = cds.utils 

 

module.exports = function () { 

    // this.on('submitOrder', (req) => {...}) //> custom actions   

    this.before('CREATE', `FormattedText.drafts`, (req) => { 

 

        req.data.ID = uuid() 

        req.data.texts = [{ "ID": req.data.ID, "value": "Ein Name", "locale": "de" }, 

        { "ID": req.data.ID, "value": "A name", "locale": "en" }] 

 

    }) 

} 

 

When we create a new entry, the translations exist in the localized database (com_websol_FormattedText_texts) but as soon as we Save the draft they disappear! 

We assume this is because the localized table seems to have no draft functionality, since we only have the following tables: 

 

  • DRAFT_DraftAdministrativeData 
  • MarkdownMaintainService_FormattedText_drafts 
  • com_websol_FormattedText 
  • com_websol_FormattedText_texts 

 

 

Additional Screenshots: 

This is how the object page looks like, when creating a draft: 

 

 

 

This is after saving (the database reflects the same):

entry.title: Re: visual code studio command run failed with error : sp...
entry.content: I was using latest version, 20 something .. For what we have investigated there is some windows update that should correct this but as our company policy only updates when released internally release the update

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 2 - Formulas
entry.content: My Hash: ec7c82663c27ad05879c9b5d995e9922b806687234afd5e9e63e2271ea853d6f

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA for Product Compliance: doubts with a Supplier compliance scenario
entry.content:
Dear Community, 

Again, I'm in need of some help to clear some doubts that have been put forward by a customer, regarding supplier's compliance.

I'm implementing SAP S/4HANA for Product Compliance, on-prem, version 2023.

Scenario:

Customer buys the same Product to the same Supplier, to be delivered in two different plants located in two countries with different legal requirements:

  • Product A01, Supplier S01, for Plant in Portugal.
  • Product A01, Supplier S01, for Plant in Morocco.

Question 1: How can I assure Supplier's compliance, considering that SAP doesn't always provide (all) legal requirements for checks for a certain country and/or a region in a country (in the example above, SAP doesn't provide any of Morocco's legal requirements and for Spain, it just provides nation-wide requirements but not regional ones).

Question 2: In the case that I have all legal requirements for checks, is it enough to assess product marketability in each country and perform just one supplier's compliance check, regarding that I have created adequate compliance purposes (like one for each country)?

Thank you in advance.

 

PS: This is regarding the use of SAP

entry.title: Re: Create Adobe form with fragments as a copy of the standard.
entry.content:
Not sure if this thread is being monitored or not.

We created the copy of the form and downloaded the XSD file using FB_XDP_DOWN. However, when we opened the XDP file in adobe livecycle designer, we were not able to see anything in the design view tab. Please let us know what could be the issue.

entry.title: Re: Haven't received any mail from SAP
entry.content: What exam are you referring to, @AdityaShome_10 ?

entry.title: Re: Email not received yet
entry.content: What exam are you referring to, @Gaurav_Singh ?

entry.title: SAP S/4HANa for Product Compliance Data Migration approach: Raw Materials - Bulk vs Packaged.
entry.content:
Dear Community, 

Again, I'm in need of some help to clear some doubts that have been put forward by a customer, regarding supplier's compliance.

I'm implementing SAP S/4HANA for Product Compliance, on-prem, version 2023.

Scenario:

Customer buys the same Product to the same Supplier, to be delivered in two different plants located in two countries with different legal requirements:

  • Product A01, Supplier S01, for Plant in Portugal.
  • Product A01, Supplier S01, for Plant in Morocco.

Question 1: How can I assure Supplier's compliance, considering that SAP doesn't always provide (all) legal requirements for checks for a certain country and/or a region in a country (in the example above, SAP doesn't provide any of Morocco's legal requirements and for Spain, it just provides nation-wide requirements but not regional ones).

Question 2: In the case that I have all legal requirements for checks, is it enough to assess product marketability in each country and perform just one supplier's compliance check, regarding that I have created adequate compliance purposes (like one for each country)?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: "Combination of plant and movement not allowed"
entry.content:
Hello @Madhukumarlk 

See the note 1089773 - INMA MM: Legal change in Chile and Customizing_SAP_Note_1089773.pdf document attached there.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Set-up times depending on quantity / Mengenbezogene R...
entry.content: Hi arjuna_bandara, you mean a formula like this ( Set-up time * Operation splits ) ?

entry.title: Re: I have a confusion regarding SAP Community ID
entry.content:
Hi @NILESH4TH2024  and @ayusc sorry to jump in here, but the ID should be from the SAP Community profile, which is public, e.g. mine is 467, which is shown in the url as well: https://community.sap.com/t5/user/viewprofilepage/user-id/467

 

 

The P- oder S-user is more private information, which you should not share 😉

entry.title: SAP Query
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to create a custom field in SAP Query that indicates whether a material has been in the warehouse for more than 6 weeks. The goal is to compare the material's posting date (MSEG.BUDAT_MKPF) with the current date (SY-DATUM) and display an 'X' in the custom field if the material's posting date is 42 days or more in the past (which corresponds to 6 weeks). Otherwise, the field should display an empty value.

Could you please confirm if the code provided below is appropriate for this problem?  I am encountering some challenges with syntax and logical expressions within SAP Query, so I would appreciate any feedback or suggestions you might have. 

IF ( MSEG.BUDAT_MKPF <= SY-DATUM - 42 ).
'X'
ELSE.
''
ENDIF.

Thank you!

Arjan

entry.title: Re: CIAP@TDF: Baixa de fichas
entry.content:
Obrigado Bruno e Kyono.

A mim também não fez sentido, o intuito foi compartilhar a dúvida para realmente saber se de fato, eu não estava deixando escapar algum ponto.

Muito obrigado!

entry.title: 1H 2024 Product Release - PLT-82081
entry.content:
Hello,

there are two different Deprecations released under the same reference number PLT-82081:

Deprecation of SAP SuccessFactors Single Sign-On Certificate | SAP Help Portal
and
Deprecation of Basic Authentication and Third-Party Corporate Identity Provider (IdP) Direct Integration with SAP SuccessFactors HCM suite | SAP Help Portal

Could you please look into it and change one of the reference numbers.

Thanks in advance
Regina

entry.title: Re: SAP Stammtisch mit Dominic Beckbauer (CPI Helper) (hybrid)
entry.content: I think it would be great if you could add the city into the title as well, so that's easier to identify directly, where the Stammtisch is. Makes sense?

entry.title: Re: Accessing response headers from remote service calls...
entry.content:
You can use SAP Cloud SDK to get raw response for your request and then parse it as per you needs.
https://sap.github.io/cloud-sdk/docs/js/features/odata/execute-request#getting-the-raw-response-and-the-original-request

entry.title: MD07 and MD06 explanation
entry.content:
Hello

Can anyone explain how we read the MD07 and MD06?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: EWM - Vendor Returns Process - Returns Delivery Vs Returns PO
entry.content:
Hello Van,

great document! I have implemented the "Returns Delivery" version in our test environment system and it is working quite fine. In our embeded on-promise system, we have only one issue: we do the Goods receipt in EWM, so the Inbound delivery is created to an EWM managed Storge Location, but we do the shipping process in ERP (TM is not yet useful for us), so when the RTV delivery is created, it is created with the EWM storage location and we would need the shipping storage location.

We can change it manually, distribute to EWM for picking and then do the shipping.

The question is: is there any badi or standard way to influence on the storage location during the RTV creation?

Thanks in advanced,

Josep M

entry.title: Combine SKUs - Application Server 8018022 and 8018042
entry.content:
Hello CA

We are working on an opportunity where the customer is in tier XS (Up to 550 FUE) and our objective are 4 Application server the 128GB in PRD tier.

In this case we should proceed like this:

3 units => 8018022 - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition Application Server for Linux, additional production tenant

4 units => 8018042 - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition Application Server for Linux, additional production tenant, upgrade

Can we continue this way with the objective of having 4 Application server the 128GB in PRD tier?

Regards,

Thiago Gama

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Kolkata 2024
entry.content: Looking forward to be a part of this group and meeting fellow sappers.It will be a wonderful experience.Thank You ! ..

entry.title: Re: How to dynamically pass parameters to SimbaDSN in code
entry.content:
First, set up the connection in the report itself instead of in code. It will ask for a URL as part of the configuration for the JDBC connection.  If you'll only ever use that connection for the report, you should then be able to just set the credentials to log in to the database in order to get the report to run.

If you need to be able to change the connection, I would debug your application and look at the properties of the report connection to find where you need to set the URL for JDBC.

-Dell

entry.title: Re: How to construct a Deep link URL for C4C Business Objects using Business object ID?
entry.content:
Hi Arun,

Quite helpful blog, thank you!

I've also faced the issue mentioned in the comments where "&para" is shown as "¶".

The solution is to write "&para" instead of "&para". The problem is solved then.

Regards,

Yener

entry.title: Re: Purchasing categories/ SAP S4 HANA PUBLIC CLOUD
entry.content:
Greetings,

In response to your inquiries, I would like to assist you by suggesting that you refer to the official documentation pertaining to the subject in question.

This will provide you with comprehensive information and guidance.

How to set up Purchasing Categories in SAP S/4HANA Cloud

Regarding the subject pertinent to "Manage Preferred Supplier Lists (Deprecated)", use this new information below.

Preferred Supplier List (4RI)

Best regards,

entry.title: Crystal XI Details Grouping
entry.content:
In Crystal Reports XI R2, I would like to split my details into two groups based on conditions. Currently the details show all parts and their names and costs in detail. I would like for products with a Product line of 0-99 to be summarized into a group labelled "Wood" and all parts with a product line 99-200 to be summarized into a line for "Metal." So essentially instead of 50+ part lines in the details section there would be 2 lines, Wood and Metal with the totals for the parts that fall into their criteria.

Tried creating a group with subgroup like group 1a and 1b but that did not work.

entry.title: Access Request Completion on Wrong System
entry.content:
Hello,

Scenerio:

Creating a access request in our development system, should assign the requested role(s) in our development system, instead, it assigns it in our Production environment.

 

We have global provisioning settings as we connect to more then one system.

Correct default connector assigned to connector group (production system is not even configured here).

In our access request form, we can select by system and it provides all the roles available in our development environment,  System  and system description fields properly state development environments.

I am uncertain where else I need to check or what I would need to change in order to assign access to our development?/testing environment.

entry.title: Learn Content Structure Changes after Item Revision by Item Connector
entry.content:
Hi Mentors,

In the Production as well Preview system, order of the online content for Item is getting changed.

We are attaching Quiz to Items manually. which means Item is at 1st level and Quiz is at 2nd level.

Whenever there is revision of items, file is getting placed over SFTP and Item Connector is processing that file. Now in SF LMS system, Item is getting revised but sequence is getting changed means Quiz is coming at 1st level and Item is showing at 2nd level.

Could you please share some thoughts on this.. 

Thanks..

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 2 - Formulas
entry.content:
I used a similar approach: I also set the maxDecimalCount to "2" to get always 2 decimal places.

"$" + FORMAT_LOCALIZED_DECIMAL(SUM(MAP(data.A_SalesOrderItem1,NUMBER(item.NetAmount) * 100)) / 100,"en",2,2)

For the chart data I have used a mapping with a formula for the Source Data (SLICE might be faster instead of SELECT)

SELECT(data.A_SalesOrderItem1, index < 6 )

Mapping for X -> source.item.Material
Mapping for Y -> NUMBER(source.item.NetAmount)

entry.title: Re: Unable to replicate data due to Mass transfer ID is a...
entry.content:
Did you undeployed the table? Because the table is removed from MassTransfer configuration only by undeploy process. Otherwise table is still in configuration and you cannot run transfer for the same table again.
As option if you have an access to the backed you can goto SLT configuration and stop table manually. And try run the replicaiton flow again.

entry.title: Re: Connecting UI5 TypeScript Components locally
entry.content: @WouterLemaire Nice and clear explanations. Any idea how would be possible to make it work in case if both apps were deployed to a SAPUI5 Repository to an On-Premise system?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano ,

I am a SAP MM Consultant expertise in both Sourcing and procurement with 2.3 years of professional IT experience .I Identify as a person for the certification SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sourcing and Procurement which will boost my career, level of expertise and confidence. Identifying as a member of below categories

  • People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts 
  • Minorities who may not have equal opportunity in their geographic location 
  • First generation college students
  • People looking to switch their careers mid-life

I really love working with SAP because it helps businesses improve their processes. It's amazing to see how technology can make such a big difference. I want to keep learning and growing in this field to have a great career.

I'm eager to take a free certification attempt because I believe it will help me learn more and become even better at what I do. I know that the world of technology is always changing, and I want to stay up-to-date with the latest advancements.I am grateful for this opportunity and excited about the possibilities ahead. Hopefully you will consider my profile for the free certification attempt and with reference to step 2 please send the registration link .

Thanks & Regards,

NiteeshReddy.

entry.title: Re: Consumption of an API within a Custom POD Plugin in S...
entry.content: Excuse me @ManoelCosta Could you assist me with this please?

entry.title: Re: Should i Require SLT License for below scenario ECC/C...
entry.content: I'm not a big expert in the question of licensing, but if you would like to use SLT on top of ECC system - yes, you need license for SLT

entry.title: Re: Set-up times depending on quantity / Mengenbezogene R...
entry.content: Hi, You can have up to 6 parameters assigned formulas in a work center based on the standard value key you have defined in the customizing. Work center assigned routing can have those 6 parameter values. You can refer the below for more on standard value and formulas https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/d74941cf210b44768dc074ce2f243890/b373b65334e6b54ce10000000a174cb4.html?q=work%20center%20standard%20value%20key

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Kolkata 2024
entry.content: I would like to join as participant. I have clicked yes and I didn't got any email for confirmation. Can you please help me.

entry.title: Select Quantity only in CASES from SOURCEBIN while creating WAREHOUSE TASK
entry.content:
Team,

 

We have a requirement in S4 HANA cloud where System should restrict the user to Pick partial quantity. Picking should always be done for the complete Case Quantity as per conversion rate maintained in the material master.

System should skip the BIN/Batch wherein Stock is less than the Case Quantity.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility EWM - Warehouse Order Processing EWM - Delivery Processing

entry.title: Re: Deliver Real-World Results with SAP Business AI: Q4 2023 & Q1 2024 Release Highlights
entry.content: Thanks a lot for this summary. Very helpful to understand impact and plans of SAP.

entry.title: Re: The SAP Extended Warehouse Management FAQ Series: End of Mainstream Maintenance
entry.content:
In our case our customer have a EWM on SAP ERP - 9.5 (decentralized mode linked to s/4hana 2020) with NW 7.5 on RISE and we need to move to decentralized system to SAP EWM on SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition.

Is possible to choose this transition via conversion to s/4hana or need to install from scratch on RISE the EWM on SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition and migrate the data via migration cockpit tool?


Regards

entry.title: Re: How to prevent UI5 to open multiple Websocket connect...
entry.content: Ok, I don't get the error "Failed to fetch worker script" anymore. But nevertheless the SharedWorker doesn't work as intended. The worker script is still not executed.

entry.title: Profit Centers - Actuals (Design Studio) - "Jump to" - Navigation-Link
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

On the following SAP Fiori app:

Profit Centers - Actuals (Design Studio) - F0944A

https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F0944A')/S23OP

 

I face the following error:

The "Jump To"-Button does a infinity-loading after clicking on it. Result should just be the in-app navigation to other existing Fiori Applications that are related to this app eg. Display G/L Account Balances, etc. All error logs and console is empty:

Can someone help?

Regards,

Mann_im_Fass

entry.title: Can we configure the default to allow users to remove optional learning assignments
entry.content: Can we configure the default as on to allow users to remove optional learning assignments at the Item and Program level? It looks like it's currently switched off as the default setting.

entry.title: Re: Release universal Journal task - subitem issue
entry.content: You need to maintain Group Reporting Master Data Subitem Category. Please refer to KBA 3124924 - Group Reporting: Asset Transaction Type mapping to Consolidation Transaction Type does not get reflected during data release.

entry.title: SAP Companion Element Conditions
entry.content:
Hello everybody!

I have been testing Element conditions for SAP companion and I've been wondering if anyone here has been able to make Element conditions work for type in fields (i.e. a help bubble shows up only if you type a specific word detailed while creating the condition). 

This is what I did: 

1. created the help bubble and assigned a hotspot to a type in field

2. saved the changes for the new bubble

3. opened Conditions, and set it up using the following options: use assigned hotspot, value is, the word "Home" (see image below) (I have also tried Value contains using the same steps)

4. saved changes 

In other words, the help bubble should only show if someone types the word "Home" however the help bubble sticks there while the field is empty and if I type a different word other than "Home". See image below:

Question: is there any other way to best use Element Conditions. Am I setting it up correctly? Or maybe Element Conditions are not so polished yet?

entry.title: Can I format a date dimension in SAC with a BW Live Connection?
entry.content:
We are using the SAC Live Connection with BW queries.

We discovered, that we can only use 0CALDAY und 0CALMONTH etc. for the date.

Unfortunatly the format for Q is eg 20241, 20242 etc. and for month 01.2024, 02.2024 etc.

This looks not very user frienly. We would like to have it like in 0CALMONTH2, where we have Q1, Q2, Q3 and JAN, FEB etc. But this is not supported as date in SAC, only as dimension. 

Is there any way to get another formats in the visualisation as live connection (see attached goal instead of current)?

entry.title: SAP Companion Element condition
entry.content:
Hello everybody!

I have been testing Element conditions for SAP companion and I've been wondering if anyone here has been able to make Element conditions work for type in fields (i.e. a help bubble shows up only if you type a specific word detailed while creating the condition). 

This is what I did: 

1. created the help bubble and assigned a hotspot to a type in field

2. saved the changes for the new bubble

3. opened Conditions, and set it up using the following options: use assigned hotspot, value is, the word "Home" (see image below) (I have also tried Value contains using the same steps)

 

4. saved changes 

In other words, the help bubble should only show if someone types the word "Home" however the help bubble sticks there while the field is empty and if I type a different word other than "Home". See image below:

 

 

Question: is there any other way to best use Element Conditions. Am I setting it up correctly? Or maybe Element Conditions are not so polished yet?

entry.title: Re: Group Reporting: Custom fields not included in data r...
entry.content: Which S/4 HANA version you are using? Per note 2940122 - Fincs: Release task - Improvements to Journal entry planned release (ACDOCP), it is possible for S/4 HANA 1909 SP04 and S/4 HANA 2020 onwards.

entry.title: Re: F150 - Sending email to CC
entry.content:
The MHND is a table parameter of the FM actually calling the BTE (PRINT_DUNNING_NOTICE[ ,_SF,_PDF] 

  • Try to debug the call (stack) to find actual caller, with luck those data would be stored in global area. or look for another BTE to find this information (e.g. 00001020?) and save it in some shared memory or in some appended fields in CI_MHNK.
  • But there can be multiple documents for a single MHNK record (so multiple users)

entry.title: Re: Learning Material for - SAC Certification ?
entry.content: Okay Thank you

entry.title: Loading Reuse S1 Component from Manage Material coverage app gives errors
entry.content:
Hi folks,

I have deployed pp_mrp_reuses1(F0844) component as a custom library into abap repo. my aim is to run the extended version of app Manage Material Coverage(F0251) which should use a fragment of my custom library where i have extended my fields for the table.. To open Manage material i already have extended Monitor Material coverage app(F0247A).  all three apps are deployed onto the repository.

 
Problem i am facing is when i navigate from monitor materials to manage materials app i am getting an error from the library files of the standard reuse component pp_mrp_reuses1.
I am able to load my custom Reuse Library that i can see from sources but error comes up in the standard part of the library somehow. Random errors in S3parent of standard reuse component come-up.
I see all three extended/adapted apps running in the sources.
For navigation i am using 
sap.ushell.Container.getService("CrossApplicationNavigation")  
toExternal method. with my semantic object action and parameters opening my extended version of the manage materials app.
So confused as to what piece of this puzzle is a miss??

entry.title: Re: F150 - Sending email to CC
entry.content: Thank you Raymond, I will investigate BTE 1020.

entry.title: Re: Some of UI annotations/Local annotations for LROP Fiori application.
entry.content:
Very nice blog!

I'm struggeling with navigation to a semantic object (to a Standard Fiori App) passing the FieldValue as a parameter (e.g. Vbeln). How can I configure this locally (annotation.xml / manifest.json).

Can anyone help?

 

Regards,

Sebastian

entry.title: Re: Consumption of an API within a Custom POD Plugin in S...
entry.content:
It is not possible to make API calls from the plugin with a relative path, as it will use the path of SAP DM, where this destination cannot be found.

For DM own APIs, I would suggest to look into the getPublicApiRestDataSourceUri function from the ProductionComponent.

If you want to call other APIs, there are two possibilites:

You could register them in DM and use them in a production process. Call the production process from the plugin using getPeRestDataSourceUri function.

Or directly call it from the plugin using a BTP destination and the application router. In this case, you cannot use a relative path. The path needs to begin with the absolute path of your plugin application URL, followed by the term from the app router (in your case /sapApi). So something like https://<appURL>/sapApi/order/...

entry.title: Re: SAP CRYSTAL REPORT 2020 support ODBC DRIVER 18 FOR SQ...
entry.content: I see it's supported in CR 2020 SP 4 now, update CR 2020 and it will be supported Patch 300 - https://origin.softwaredownloads.sap.com/public/site/index.html

entry.title: Re: Crystal XI Details Grouping
entry.content:
You'll create a formula similar to the following (I'm assuming that part number is a numeric field...)

If {table.PartNumber} >= 0 and {table.PartNumber} <= 99 then 
  "Wood"
else
  "Metal"

Group on this formula and configure the group to sort descending if you want Wood to be on the report first.

-Dell

entry.title: Re: Why are we always receiving the "Missing parameter values" error?
entry.content: I added the tag "SAP Crystal Reports, version for Visual Studio" to your question. This is the correct tag to use when asking questions about using the .NET SDK. See https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/using-sap-crystal-reports-tags/ba-p/13559316 for more information about how to use the Crystal tags.

entry.title: Re: [Group reporting] data release on carry forward subitem
entry.content: There is no relationship between BCF in ACDOCA and ACDOCU. For GR, BCF source and target all happens in ACDOCU. ( GRPL might be a little bit different )

entry.title: Digital Banking Add-on Package for RISE and GROW with SAP
entry.content:
Over the past few years, as the business environment became more complex and volatile, finance teams have sought to establish more secured, automated and seamlessly integrated payment processes.

The newly released Digital Banking Package available both for RISE with SAP and GROW with SAP customers, offers a fully integrated payment process. It is designed to provide out-of-the-box connectivity and integration to banks and payment service providers to SAP S/4HANA Cloud. This package optimizes connectivity for scalability and flexibility, meeting the highest security standards.  Bank Connectivity is vital for treasury processes to work in a ”straight-through hands-free” fashion. Most companies deal with more than one financial service institution and would like to connect to their banks in a simple and cost-effective manner. 

As part of the Digital Banking Package, corporates get a direct connection with financial services institutions. The solution provides you with a multi-bank, digital channel between your ERP systems and your banks, offering also optionally embedded SWIFT connectivity.  It allows you to integrate payment and statement processes with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, so your finance teams can get an end-to-end visibility across your entire payment value chain.  The onboarding to the solution is very quick and is delivered through a secured cloud, owned and managed by SAP, compartmentalized for each customer and their network of banks.

The second component of the Digital Banking Package addresses the needs of customers who utilize digital payment methods such as credit cards to run their payments in an automated way. The solution offers a cloud service that processes incoming credit card- and other real-time payment methods in a secure and efficient way, significantly reducing cash reconciliation efforts.

You benefit from a central platform that connects to various Payment Service Provider with only one interface to SAP S/4HANA Cloud. Optimizing IT cost and providing not just flexibility in the choice of Payment Service Providers but also out-of-the-box payment automation from sales to cash reconciliation. The solution is fully compliant with the Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard (PCI DSS).

If you are a RISE with SAP or a GROW with SAP customer, you can benefit from this cost attractive package to ensure that your cloud ERP is seamlessly connected to any financial service provider in a quick and easy way.

To learn more information on each component of the digital banking package, please check: SAP Multi-Bank Connectivity and to Quick-start service for SAP digital payments add-on

entry.title: SAP advanced treasury and risk management package for GROW with SAP
entry.content:
do more with less resources becomes an imperative for all treasury departments. Treasurers should be committed to embrace digital transformation and to be ready to apply and consume new disruptive technologies.  

The newly released GROW with SAP advanced treasury and risk management package is now available for all GROW with SAP customers. It is composed of treasury and risk solutions to help treasurers capture exposures, classify and qualify risk, and trigger trade actions. The package also provides out-of-the-box connectivity and integration to trading platforms and trading providers, supporting end-to-end cash, investment and risk processes integrated to Cloud ERP​.  

The Treasury and Risk component of this add-on package is designed to capture exposures data, quantify, mitigate risk and helps companies make smart investments, deploy assets effectively and respond quickly to changes in financial risk positions.

You can:  

  • Monitor risk positions, price changes and currency conversion rates to develop compliant hedge accounting strategies 
  • Meet operational and regulatory reporting requirements and natively comply to IFRS 9, European Market Infrastructure Regulation, and U.S. GAAP requirements 
  • Seamless and automated Connection of external trading platforms to your Treasury and Risk Management and cash management system 
  • Initiate trade request automatically and  mange back to back deal transaction thru Trading platform integration 

In addition, the add-on package provides you with an integrated connection to leading trading platforms like 360T, FxAll, Bloomberg, ICD, Morgen money and others trading partners.

The solution includes:  

  • Single service powered by SAP BTP App to be used for inbound and outbound​ 
  • Outbound Service (Manage trade request)​ 
  • Inbound Services (Manage trade)​  
  • One solution and one contract, low implementation cost​ 
  • Straight through processing capability w/o multiple data entries & disrupted workflows​ 
  • System landscape simplification by get rid of any middle ware​ 
  • Quick and easy onboarding process ​ 

To learn more information on each component of  GROW with SAP advanced treasury and risk management package, please check: SAP Treasury and Risk Management and SAP Trading Platform Integration

entry.title: 5 Reasons why Planners Should Consider the RISE with SAP Advanced Supply Chain Planning Package
entry.content:
On April 16th, SAP launched a game-changer for supply chain planners who are leveraging (or plan to leverage) the SAP RISE solutions, offering a comprehensive solution to optimize and streamline supply chain planning and operations. This article identifies five good reasons why you should further examine this package.

1. Create an Intelligent and Risk-Resilient Supply Chain

In the recent years, the disruptions caused by the pandemic and the later geo-political escalations highlighted the vulnerabilities in traditional supply chains, such as global sourcing challenges, transportation disruptions, and demand volatility. Companies now understand the importance of building resilience into their supply chain strategies to mitigate risks, respond quickly to disruptions and ensure continuity of operations.

RISE with SAP Supply Chain Planning package provides automated and tightly coordinated supply chain planning processes, powered by advanced AI-driven intelligence. This enables immediate response to disruptions, ensuring your supply chain remains robust and profitable.


2. Enhance Your Supply Chain Resilience

The business software package includes four essential products to establish a resilient and tightly coordinated supply chain planning process.

 

  • Sales and Operations Planning (S&OP)

Traditionally, S&OP tools align sales forecasts with production capabilities, inventory levels, and procurement targets to enable companies to have strategic plan for the year, without providing them the means to respond meaningfully to unexpected disruptions. SAP IBP for Sales and Operations goes beyond that, unifying financial and operational stakeholders in one S&OP process to foster collaboration – aligning inventory, service levels, and profitability. This integrated approach enables companies to optimize resources, reduce excess inventory, and respond swiftly to changes in demand or supply chain disruptions, while protecting their financial goals.

 

  • Supply Chain Visibility

Supply chain visibility is crucial for businesses as it provides real-time insights into the entire supply chain network, from suppliers to customers. This visibility allows companies to track inventory levels, monitor production progress, identify potential bottlenecks or disruptions, and make data-driven decisions to optimize operations. SAP Supply Chain Control Tower help planners to identify and analyze supply chain disruptions, take corrective action, and respond and collaborate with external supply chain partners.

 

  • Manufacturing Planning and Scheduling

During periods of high demand, manufacturing companies must prioritize the optimization of critical resources, allocate labor capacity effectively, and utilize available inventories efficiently for crucial orders. SAP S/4HANA Manufacturing for planning and scheduling provides comprehensive production planning and scheduling tool that help Supply Chain planners to create production plans and schedules based on the business sales, operations, and inventory plans with instant feedback loops from manufacturing and logistic execution.

 

  • Order Promising

Finally, order promising is the most critical aspect of supply chain resilience, allowing companies to commit accurate delivery dates to customers based on real-time visibility into inventory levels, production capacity, and logistics constraints. By improving order promising accuracy, companies can enhance customer satisfaction and maintain trust even during challenging times. SAP S/4HANA advanced Available-To-Promise provides accurate and reliable order promise dates to customer orders, considering the relevant supplies across the network and critical supply chain constraints, in real-time, while protecting companies’ business priorities and profitability goals.

 

3. Save Time and Cost with an Optimized Inventory Management

With RISE with SAP, you gain intelligent visibility across your entire supply network, allowing you to manage inventory efficiently. This visibility enables informed and responsive planning decisions, reducing the need for constant re-planning and optimization. You can seamlessly integrate workflows from strategic planning to order promising and fulfillment, ensuring a smooth and efficient supply chain operation.


4. Competitive Pricing and Simplified Integration

RISE with SAP offers an attractive competitive price point with a simple fixed price, making it accessible to businesses of all sizes. Additionally, with an end-to-end solution from one software provider and built on one domain model for out-of-the-box integration, you can enjoy optimized connectivity, scalability, flexibility, and the highest security standards.

5. Unlock the Full Potential of Your Business

In conclusion, supply chain planning resilience in the post-pandemic era is essential for companies to navigate uncertainties effectively. Integrated and collaborative sales and operations planning, end-to-end supply chain visibility, effective order promising, and efficient production scheduling are key components that enable companies to build agile and resilient supply chains capable of adapting to evolving market conditions and disruptions. RISE with SAP offers a comprehensive solution to transform your supply chain into an intelligent and resilient powerhouse. You will experience end-to-end workflows that enable planning and exception-based issue resolutions, enhancing your supply chain resilience. Check out our website for further details or contact your SAP trusted advisor!

entry.title: Re: SAP CodeJams in 🇧🇪 Ghent, BE & 🇩🇪 Herne, DE

I wanted to show what I did to my collegue but for an unknown reason I lost my trial account and the content of it. So is there a way to retreive the content the application with some import/export ?

Thx

entry.title: scheduler crystal report - parameter
entry.content:
Hello,

Trying to leave today's date on the invoice date field so the report can be sent on schedule on today's date. Please advise what the field contents would be. thank you.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
My name is Seif Elsayed, and I am reaching out to express my sincere interest in free certification attempt. I recently came across your initiative and was inspired by the commendable work you are doing to support underrepresented people with this initiative.
I am an engineering graduate with a passion for ERP Systems and I’ve completed my military service. I am eager to transition into the technology industry to get a kick start in my career within the SAP Ecosystem.
I’ve just completed my learning journey across SAP SuccessFactor Employee Central Core.(THR80,THR81and THR79)
Understanding the importance of certification in the technology industry, I am writing to request your support in providing me with a free certification attempt. This assistance would not only be immensely valuable for my personal and professional growth but also serve as a pivotal step in breaking barriers and fostering diversity within the tech sector.
I am enthusiastic about the prospect of joining the SAP community and utilizing the skills gained to make a positive impact.
Thank you for your time and consideration.
Best regards!

 

seifnasser

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 1 - S/4HANA OData
entry.content: Thank you very much for your reply. As I am a very beginner with SAP Build Apps, I am having trouble getting the numbers displayed correctly. How do I make it so that the values are displayed with 2 numbers after the decimal point? Could you direct where I could find the answer? Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 2 - Formulas
entry.content: Unfortunately, I think the hash is not correct. Can you make sure you have formatted the string the right way (with "en" as formatting language) and have the top 20 items?

entry.title: Re: Planning Professional vs Planning standard Capabilities
entry.content: Thanks @SeerOfSig for your inputs. Yes, we do have a Test Tenant which comes with 20 licenses with all access ( planner/planning prof/BI / Digital boardroom) but within our org we have 3 prod tenants used by individual groups/businesses and we are working towards consolidating them in single prod tenant to save cost and bring ops efficiency. Hence, wanted to understand if we don't keep plan. prof license ( which is the most expensive type of license) then what we will be loosing? i think your msg around (Changes like Date settings, (adding additional years to the model for planning), turning on or off data locking, changing audit settings, adding or removing dimensions from the model) .if you have a Date dimension with values until 2030 , can date setting be managed then? also, anything in SAC calendar which only plan. prof can do? Appreciate your inputs.

entry.title: Re: visual code studio command run failed with error : sp...
entry.content: Same issue here. Using nodejs v20.12.2

entry.title: Re: KE24 Report comparison with FI GL account balance report
entry.content: same issue here

entry.title: How to get the an item description in excel without have login in SAP
entry.content:
I hope to be in the right community for this question.

 

I'd like to open an excel file and I'd like to write a code item in a certain column and I'd like to get the description in the next column.

Would be perfect to list a certain number of item codes and then only one time actualize the next column obtaining all the descriptions at the same time.

In case a way exists,  please can you also explain me how to login excel with the SAP user?

entry.title: Re: What's new viewer API availability
entry.content:
Hi,
Thanks for the question.
There is currently no externally available API and no current plans to release an externally available API.

entry.title: Mitigating gender bias with Job description Generator?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
we were originally interested in the Job Analyzer because it reduces gender bias. However, as it is not available in German, we have considered activating the other tool, which covers significantly more interesting functions. Do you know whether it also mitigates gender bias in its language?

Thank you!

Vicki

entry.title: Bind App to hdi-container with specific role or read-only privilege (cloud foundry)
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to bind an application to a hdi-container in such way that the application can only read from it.

So either to specify somewhere grant the role "XXX" to _RT  or restrict the privilege to SELECT on the schema.

Any idea how to perform this restriction ?

Thank you

Yann

Is there any better source that clearly states, what is working ?

entry.title: Re: Fiori Application not fetching the data from back end...
entry.content: how you start your app? maybe you are running it with mock data. just don't run with mock data if it is now.

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports 2020 SP4 installs, doesn't start (spins forever)
entry.content: I engaged our internal Cybersecurity team and they stated that nothing is blocking Crystal Reports 2020 from running

entry.title: Re: PNPCE Selection screen

i hope this solves your issue.

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports 2020 SP4 installs, doesn't start (spins forever)
entry.content: Apparently, there is no technical support for this product -- other than via this forum. Can someone from the Crystal Reports team look at this please?

entry.title: Can a user log on to the BTP Build Workzone (standard edition) with UN + PW instead of SSO?
entry.content: Not for external Users, this question is for Users who we provide a HR Service for and are not in our AD yet, but they will be in future, the migration is just taking a while. with SF, users can have a URL which is non-SSO enabled, so I was just wondering if we can have the same type of URL to be made available for this group of Users? Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Payload Logging with Groovy Script: java.lang.NoSuchMethodException: No signature of method
entry.content: Nice reply , its work for me , i was facing same error

entry.title: Re: Consumption of an API within a Custom POD Plugin in S...
entry.content:
Hello tobias. Thank you for your answer.

 

We already tried the absolute route: https://<appURL>/sapApi/order/ but we face CORS issues doing it that way.

 

What can we do to solve it?

entry.title: Re: Talent Intelligence Hub - Myths and Misconceptions - Part 2 (Migration)
entry.content: @Manisha_Singh using skills in Interview Central requires TIH. Legacy skills are not supported.

entry.title: Sap Business One 10.00 update SP 2402
entry.content:
I would like to ask if anyone is facing the same problem as me.

We updated our system from version 10.0 (10.00.240) FP 2305 to version 10.0 (10.00.240) SP 2402 and we are experiencing slowdowns on several computers after this update.

Before the update, we did not have this problem.

Computers keep freezing the screen, slow to open other applications.

After restarting the computer it works fine for a moment, until it starts to crash again after a few minutes of using SAP.

What is happening?

entry.title: Re: Standard BAPI Function to Retrieve Domain Values?
entry.content:
BAPI is not mandatory, you just need any RFC-enabled function module (DD_DOMVALUES_GET and DDUT_DOMVALUES_GET are not RFC-enabled in my 7.40 system), so it has been already answered, you can find it by searching from your Web search engine:

"rfc" "domain" "values" site:sap.com
